---
title: "Conferences & Meetings"
toc: true
---

## Upcoming Events

::: {.callout-note icon=false title="Next Conference"}

**CCPRO Annual Conference**

- **Date:** June 4th, 2026
- **Location:** *(Tri-College Conference)*

| College | City | Address |
|--------|------|---------|
| Haywood Community College | Clyde, NC | 185 Freedlander Dr, Clyde, NC 28721 |
| College of the Albemarle | Elizabeth City, NC | 1208 N Road St, Elizabeth City, NC 27909 |
| Johnston Community College | Smithfield, NC | 245 College Rd, Smithfield, NC 27577 |

- **Registration:** [Register here](#) <!-- Replace with registration link -->

:::

<!-- Add additional upcoming events as needed -->

## Past Conferences

| Year | Event | Date | Location | 
|------|-------|----------|---------|
| 2025 | No Conference Hosted | NA | NA |
| 2024 | Business Meeting | 10/17/2024 | Raleigh Conference Center, Raleigh, NC | 
| 2023 | Annual Conference | 10/23/23 - 10/25/23 | Hilton Raleigh North Hills. Raleigh, NC |
| 2022 | Annual Conference | 11/2/22 - 11/4/22 | J.E. Broyhill Civic Center, Lenior, NC | 

## Meeting Minutes

Meeting minutes from CCPRO business meetings are available on the [Documents](documents.qmd) page.
